title: JSON schema for Cirrus CI configuration files

allow_failures.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

privileged.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

dockerfile.description: Relative path to Dockerfile to build container from.

kvm.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

use_in_memory_disk.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

use_static_ip.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

only_if.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

cpu.description: CPU units for the container to use.

dockerfile.description: Relative path to Dockerfile to build container from.

memory.description: Memory in megabytes for the container to use.

volumes.description: A list of volumes mounted inside of the container.

prefixItems.description: A volume in the format of source:target[:ro].

image.description: Source VM image (or name) to clone the new VM from.

softnet.description: Enable or disable the Softnet networking.

name.description: Volume name that will be mounted into /Volumes/My Shared Files/<name>.

readonly.description: Whether this volume should be mounted in readonly mode.

source.description: Volume source, a path to a directory on the host.

target.description: Volume target, a path to a directory in the guest.

disk_size.description: Disk size to use in gigabytes.

image.description: Source VM image (or name) to clone the new VM from.

resources.description: Resources to acquire on the Persistent Worker.

skip.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

windows_container.description: Windows Container definition for Community Cluster.

dockerfile.description: Relative path to Dockerfile to build container from.

use_static_ip.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

allow_failures.description: Boolean expression that can use environment variables.

fingerprint_key.description: Cache key in it's raw form.

fingerprint_script.description: Script that is used to calculate cache key.

folder.description: Path of a folder to cache.

folders.description: A list of folders to cache.

optimistically_restore_on_miss.description: Boolean expression. A flag to enable optimistic cache restoration on miss by finding the latest available key.

populate_script.description: In case of a cache miss this script will be executed.

reupload_on_changes.description: Boolean expression. A flag to check if contents of folder has changed after a cache hit.

from_contents.description: Provide the file contents directly instead of using an environment variable.

variable_name.description: Environment variable name to get the file contents from.

depends_on.description: List of task names this task depends on.
